summary: First-pass smoke test of Ansh portfolio (backend + frontend). All 7 backend endpoints pass. All 8 frontend flows tested pass, including sections rendering, navigation, live stats display, contact form validation & successful submission with toast.
passed: GET /api/github/stats -> 200, username=anshyadav669, public_repos=1, followers=0, total_stars=1, top_repos array present
GET /api/leetcode/stats -> 200, AnshKumarYadav, total_solved=303, easy=122, medium=155, hard=26 (all non-negative ints)
POST /api/contact valid payload -> 200 with status=success + id, persisted in Mongo
POST /api/contact invalid email -> 422 with pydantic value_error
GET /api/contact -> 200 array of stored messages (2 present)
Nav visible; nav-{about,skills,cp,github,projects,experience,contact}-link scroll to correct sections
CP: LeetCode card renders 303/122/155/26; CodeChef card renders 1538 and 2★
GitHub Stats: profile card + repos grid render
Projects: both project-card-0 and project-card-1 render
Contact form: invalid email keeps values (inline reject); valid submit clears form and shows success toast
Scroll progress bar and back-to-top button appear on scroll
notes: Text-only assertion for LeetCode counter '303' returned false transiently due to count-up animation, but screenshot confirms final rendered values are correct. Toast 'Message sent. I'll get back to you shortly.' visible after valid contact submission. Live third-party integrations (GitHub, LeetCode, CodeChef) all returning real data (cached 30 min).
